title: Smelt Mining
description: Smelt Mining adds an enchantment which automatically smelts your mining drops, turning ores into ingots the moment you break them!
body:
Smelt Mining adds an enchantment that automatically **smelts your mining drops** the moment you break a block — ores become **ingots**, sand becomes **glass** — and drops the matching **furnace XP**. [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1346324130261237885?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=%235865F2)](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W) ---
--- ## Customization Want to choose which blocks get smelted, tune the dropped XP, pick the supported tools, or export for a specific mod loader? Use the **[Smelt Mining Generator](https://www.sushihut.net/datapacks/smelt-mining)** to build a custom version — no setup required. If you need help or have a specific request, join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W). --- ## Installation **Datapack** 1. Download the `.zip` file. 2. Place it in `.minecraft/saves//datapacks/`. 3. Run `/reload` in-game. **Mod (Fabric / Quilt / Forge / NeoForge)** 1. Download the `.jar` file. 2. Place it in `.minecraft/mods/`. 3. Launch the game — no extra steps needed. --- ## Support Found a bug or have a suggestion? Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/wgSCCaQN5W).
